meta.name: Drive Auto Repair & Maintenance — Design Language
meta.extractedFrom: Live site content + markup (Squarespace). Layout, hierarchy, content structure, and voice observed directly; color hex values and exact font families are INFERRED from visual cues and marked with `_confidence`.
meta.usage: Reference this file in Cursor (e.g. via a .cursorrules note or @design-tokens.json) so generated UI matches the brand. Replace any value marked _confidence: 'inferred' once verified against the live site.

brand.tagline: Your Trusted Service Shop for Everything Automotive

voice.tone: Plain-spoken, warm, confidence-building. Avoids jargon and hard-sell language. Emphasizes trust, transparency, and craftsmanship.
doSay: treat every car as if it were our own

color._note: Hex values are INFERRED from the dark 'inverse' logo, automotive trade aesthetic, and typical contrast patterns. Verify against the live site and adjust the accent in particular.

base._desc: Primary dark surface implied by the light/inverse logo.

elevated._desc: Cards, panels raised off the base.

primary._desc: Automotive red as the brand accent / CTA color. PLACEHOLDER — confirm the real brand color.

typography._note: Squarespace template typically pairs a bold display sans for headings with a neutral humanist sans for body. Heading family is INFERRED; the bold all-caps make/brand list ('ACURA', 'BMW'...) confirms large, heavy, tight display headings.

heading._desc: Bold, slightly condensed display sans for big headlines and brand-name callouts.

body._desc: Clean, readable humanist sans for paragraphs and UI.

scale._note: rem-based modular scale (root = 16px). Hierarchy relationships observed from the page; exact px sizes are typical defaults.

overline._use: Eyebrow labels e.g. 'We Service All Foreign and Domestic Makes'.

sectionPaddingY._desc: Generous vertical rhythm between content sections.

radii._note: Inferred — automotive/industrial sites favor minimal-to-moderate rounding.

button._note: Primary CTA repeated across the site: 'Schedule Service', 'Contact Us', 'Get in Touch'.

nav.layout: Logo left, links center/right, prominent 'Schedule Service' CTA at the end.

card._use: Service list items and 'Why Choose Us' feature blocks.

section.pattern: Alternating dark + light full-bleed sections, each with a large heading, supporting paragraph, and one CTA. Full-width photographic imagery used as section anchors.
section.imageStyle: Full-bleed automotive/garage photography (e.g. unsplash shop + car detail shots).

content: Get in Touch (Schedule Service / Call Us)

imagery.style: Real, high-quality photography of cars, garages, and shop work. Documentary/authentic over stocky. Used full-bleed as section dividers.
imagery.treatment: Minimal overlay; lets photos breathe. Pairs with bold white headings on darker images.

layoutPrinciples: Generous whitespace and clear single-column reading flow on a wide container.
Strong type hierarchy: oversized bold headings, comfortable body line-height (~1.6).
One clear CTA per section, almost always 'Schedule Service' or 'Get in Touch'.
Alternating dark/light sections to create rhythm.
Trust signals foregrounded: warranty, OEM parts, owner onsite, years in business.

cursorUsage.howToUse: Drop this file in your repo root. In .cursorrules add: 'Use design-tokens.json as the single source of truth for colors, typography, spacing, and component styles. Treat any token marked _confidence:inferred as a default the user may override.' Then reference it with @design-tokens.json when prompting Cursor to build UI.
cursorUsage.tokenReferenceSyntax: Values in {curly.braces} are aliases pointing to other tokens — resolve them before use.
